quality.formatting_notes: Standard formatting for spell block. Scaling language ('At Higher Levels') is present and clear.
quality.mechanics_clarity: Clear. Specifies attack roll, damage type (radiant), damage dice, and the advantage condition for the next attack against the target.

mechanics.effect: Grants advantage on the next attack roll made against the target before the end of the caster's next turn.

analysis.archivist_notes: A standard, mechanically sound 1st-level Cleric spell (Evocation). The scaling is straightforward, and the rider effect (advantage on the next attack) is a powerful, short-duration benefit for a low-level slot.
